title: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
description: Five Nights at Freddy's 2 Minecraft Fully Playable Map
body:
## **This is the full playable Five Nights at Freddy's 2 Map Experience inside of Minecraft!**
This package includes a full non-offical playable recreation of Five Nights at Freddy's 2 with 6 nights.

This map has _5 Main Nights_, as well as _The 1 Bonus Night_ to play!
There are also _12 Achievements and 12 Challenges to try_!

## Map Credits:
- [Clouser](https://www.youtube.com/c/C1OUS3R): Coding/Building/Resources/Sfx
- [NoteBlockMatt](https://www.youtube.com/@NoteBlockMatt): Music/Sfx
- [KaiCoyote](https://www.pixilart.com/kaicoyote): Resources

![FNAF 2 Minecraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6755fe9cbccca8a36fd74de0d4563319e1d3b712.png)
